2008.issue: [S2008] Version 1.8.5 tagged as "latest" at npm is not signed with provenance. Trusted publishing is recommended.

4036.issue: [S4036] Consider adding .vscode/settings.json file with JSON schema definitions for better development experience with Visual Studio Code.

5004.issue: [S5004] Plain setInterval() found in source files (lib/midea/lan.js). Please use this.setInterval() or adapter.setInterval() instead.

5005.issue: [S5005] Plain setTimeout() found in source files (lib/midea/discover.js, lib/midea/lan.js, ...). Please use this.setTimeout() or adapter.setTimeout() instead.

5042.issue: [W5042] Package "luaparse" is used in source file(s) (lib/midea/scripts/extract-lua-tables.js) but not found in dependencies of [package.json](https://github.com/TA2k/ioBroker.midea/blob/master/package.json). Dependency might be missing.

5043.issue: [S5043] Package "path" is a built-in Node.js module. Please use "node:path" instead.

5049.issue: [E5049] process.env is used in source files (lib/midea/scripts/fetch-protocol-lua.js). process.env is incompatible with compact mode. Please use adapter configuration instead.

5050.issue: [E5050] process.exit() used in  (lib/midea/scripts/diff-lua-vs-js.js, lib/midea/scripts/extract-lua-tables.js, lib/midea/scripts/fetch-protocol-lua.js, lib/midea/scripts/generate-maps.js). This is incompatible with compact mode as it terminates the entire host process. Remove process.exit() or set common.compact to false at [io-package.json](https://github.com/TA2k/ioBroker.midea/blob/master/io-package.json).

5051.issue: [S5051] Custom sleep/wait function(s) found in source files (lib/midea/devices/commercialac.js). Consider using the built-in "this.delay()" method provided by the ioBroker adapter base class instead.

5601.issue: [S5601] i18n directory "admin/i18n" uses long format ({lang}/translations.json). Consider migrating to short format ({lang}.json) using "npm run translate convert".
